parameters.content:
## GSC -> fact_seo_daily + fact_seo_page_daily (PAGINATED)

PROPERTY: URL-prefix  https://cwsisecurity.com/  (no www, trailing slash).
NO domain property exists, so 'sc-domain:...' will 403.

GSC retains ~16 months only. Earliest available ~Feb 2025 - 2024 data is NOT retrievable via the API.

BOTH query nodes paginate on startRow (25k rows/page, stop when a page < 25k, hard cap 80 requests).

DAILY: leave lookback_days = 7.
ONE-TIME BACKFILL: set lookback_days = 490 (~16 months), run manually once, confirm rows, then SET IT BACK TO 7. If you forget, the daily run just re-pulls 16 months each day (idempotent, but heavy).

AFTER IMPORT:
1. 'Config' gsc_site_url already = https://cwsisecurity.com/ .
2. Select the Google OAuth2 cred (scope webmasters.readonly) on both GSC HTTP nodes.
3. GSC lags ~2 days; window ends today-2.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO fact_seo_daily
  (activity_date, region_id, clicks, impressions, ctr, avg_position, source)
VALUES (
  $1,
  (SELECT region_id FROM dim_region WHERE region_code = $2),
  $3, $4, $5, $6, $7)
ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT uq_fact_seo_grain DO UPDATE SET
  clicks = EXCLUDED.clicks,
  impressions = EXCLUDED.impressions,
  ctr = EXCLUDED.ctr,
  avg_position = EXCLUDED.avg_position,
  loaded_at = now();

INSERT INTO fact_seo_page_daily
  (activity_date, page, clicks, impressions, ctr, avg_position, source)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7)
ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT uq_fact_seo_page_grain DO UPDATE SET
  clicks = EXCLUDED.clicks,
  impressions = EXCLUDED.impressions,
  ctr = EXCLUDED.ctr,
  avg_position = EXCLUDED.avg_position,
  loaded_at = now();

INSERT INTO data_quality_log (source, run_date, rows_in, rows_written, issues, issue_pct)
VALUES ('gsc', CURRENT_DATE, $1, $2, $3, $4);

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $("Build SEO Rows").first().json._meta.rows_in + $("Build Page Rows").first().json._meta.rows_in }},{{ $("Build SEO Rows").all().length + $("Build Page Rows").all().length }},{{ $("Build SEO Rows").first().json._meta.issues + $("Build Page Rows").first().json._meta.issues }},{{ (function(){ const ri = $("Build SEO Rows").first().json._meta.rows_in + $("Build Page Rows").first().json._meta.rows_in; const is = $("Build SEO Rows").first().json._meta.issues + $("Build Page Rows").first().json._meta.issues; return ri ? Number((is / ri * 100).toFixed(2)) : 0; })() }}
